overall.description: Aerial drone flight through a foggy cyberpunk metropolis at night, navigating between massive residential towers toward a central corporate megatower illuminated with red neon lights. The footage is clearly from a video game engine, featuring dense atmospheric haze and distinctive futuristic architecture reminiscent of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City.

agents.ego_description: flying steadily forward through the urban canyon between two massive residential towers

entered.detail: tall dark skyscraper with dense grid of illuminated yellow windows
tall dark skyscraper with dense grid of illuminated yellow windows
massive corporate tower with distinctive vertical red neon lights and circular red logo near the top

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a stabilized drone flight through a narrow aerial corridor flanked by two massive residential megatowers. The buildings create a canyon-like effect with their grids of illuminated windows piercing through the dense fog. In the distance, the central corporate tower with its iconic red neon lighting serves as the focal point ahead.

events.description: slight trajectory adjustment to center the main tower in the frame as it grows larger

agents.ego_description: continuing forward approach as the central tower dominates more of the viewport and side buildings recede

entered.detail: distant industrial structures with red warning lights visible through the fog on the horizon

segments.scene_description: As the drone advances, the left residential tower exits the frame while the central megatower grows substantially larger, revealing more architectural detail. The spatial layout opens slightly, and distant industrial structures with red aviation lights become visible on the right horizon through the persistent fog.

events.description: right residential tower exits frame, leaving only the central tower and distant cityscape

agents.ego_description: flying close to the central tower, revealing the detailed structure of the building's facade and neon lighting systems

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the drone approaches very close to the central megatower, which now fills the majority of the frame with its imposing height and intricate red neon lighting. The side buildings have completely exited the view, revealing more of the fog-shrouded cityscape below and the industrial districts in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drone flight through a claustrophobic urban canyon that gradually opens up to reveal the imposing scale of a central corporate megatower. It begins by navigating a narrow aerial corridor flanked by two massive residential towers, where grids of illuminated windows pierce through a dense, atmospheric fog. As the drone advances, the left tower exits the frame and the spatial layout expands, bringing distant industrial structures with red aviation lights into view on the right horizon. The scene then shifts as the central megatower grows substantially larger, eventually filling the majority of the frame with its intricate red neon lighting. Finally, the surrounding buildings vanish from sight, leaving the camera to hover close to the towering monolith above a fog-shrouded cityscape and distant industrial districts.
